strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and agentic workflows via re:cinq and GISCollective
Proven track record in scaling technical systems under high-throughput conditions (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Active contributor to open-source tooling and developer infrastructure, showing strong engineering craftsmanship and teaching ability
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lack of clear demonstration of AI systems deployed in regulated fintech environments with financial or compliance consequences
Resume uses inconsistent name (James Smith vs. Bogdan Szabo) and lacks quantified impact on AI-agent systems or fintech outcomes
response.justification: The candidate shows strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and early agentic tooling, with relevant experience in high-throughput environments and open-source infrastructure development, but lacks demonstrable leadership at executive scale and direct experience in regulated fintech domains critical to the role.
